title: cli: history.db stored unencrypted — comment promises Phase 2 at-rest encryption but never tracks it
description: cli/src/history.rs:1-7 — The Phase 2 comment 'at-rest encryption keyed from the identity key is Phase 2' is load-bearing: it promises users their message history will be encrypted at rest but there is no open issue tracking it. The comment has been in the file since Phase 1 and will remain indefinitely. Risk: if a user's data directory is exfiltrated, all cleartext chat history is readable. Action: file a Beads issue for local history encryption so the promise has a tracking artifact, or reword the comment to say 'not planned for this implementation'.
